name: Risotto Alla Milanese
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Marsala wine or white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the stock to a simmer and sprinkle in the saffron. Keep it at a simmer over moderately low heat.
2. In a large nonreactive saucepan or flameproof casserole, heat the oil over moderate heat. Add onion and prosciutto; cook until the onion is softened and translucent, about 2 minutes.
3. Add rice and stir to coat with oil and become slightly translucent. Add Marsala and cook, stirring until it evaporates.
4. Add 1/2 cup of simmering stock and cook, stirring constantly, until rice is almost tender but still slightly crunchy in the center, 20-25 minutes.
5. Stir in cheese and season with pepper and salt to taste. Continue cooking, adding more stock as necessary (about 1/4 cup at a time), until rice is tender yet firm and bound with creamy sauce, 3-6 minutes longer.
6. Remove from heat and stir in butter. Serve hot.
